allOf.description: Defines common settings for a scraper controller configuration. Scraper controller receivers can embed this struct, instead of receiver.Settings, and extend it with more fields if needed.

collection_interval.description: Sets how frequently the scraper should be called and used as the context timeout to ensure that scrapers don't exceed the interval.

initial_delay.description: Sets the initial start delay for the scraper, any non positive value is assumed to be immediately.

timeout.description: An optional value used to set scraper's context deadline.

allOf.description: MetricsBuilderConfig is a configuration for sample metrics builder.

metrics.description: MetricsConfig provides config for sample metrics.

default.metric.description: DefaultMetricMetricConfig provides config for the default.metric metric.

default.metric.to_be_removed.description: DefaultMetricToBeRemovedMetricConfig provides config for the default.metric.to_be_removed metric.

metric.input_type.description: MetricInputTypeMetricConfig provides config for the metric.input_type metric.

optional.metric.description: OptionalMetricMetricConfig provides config for the optional.metric metric.

optional.metric.empty_unit.description: OptionalMetricEmptyUnitMetricConfig provides config for the optional.metric.empty_unit metric.

reaggregate.metric.description: ReaggregateMetricMetricConfig provides config for the reaggregate.metric metric.

system.cpu.time.description: SystemCPUTimeMetricConfig provides config for the system.cpu.time metric.

resource_attributes.description: ResourceAttributesConfig provides config for sample resource attributes.

map.resource.attr.description: ResourceAttributeConfig provides common config for a map.resource.attr resource attribute.

metrics_exclude.description: Experimental: MetricsExclude defines a list of filters for attribute values. If the list is not empty, metrics with matching resource attribute values will not be emitted. MetricsInclude has higher priority than MetricsExclude.

items.description: Config configures the matching behavior of a Filter.

metrics_include.description: Experimental: MetricsInclude defines a list of filters for attribute values. If the list is not empty, only metrics with matching resource attribute values will be emitted.

items.description: Config configures the matching behavior of a Filter.

job_name.description: Name of the scrape job, used to identify the source in telemetry.

targets.description: List of targets to scrape metrics from.

labels.description: Static key-value labels attached to all metrics from this target.

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts for failed scrapes.

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for each scrape request.

host_name.description: The host name to connect to.
